hero.title: Is your money growing… or standing still?
hero.subtitle: While inflation erodes capital in LATAM, major portfolios diversify into international assets.
hero.highlight: It's not just about buying a property. It's about structuring your capital in solid markets.

reality.title: Most investors make one of these mistakes:
errors: Investing everything in a single country

solution.title: Three ways to invest globally.
solution.subtitle: One strategic decision.
solution.description: Not all investors have the same profile. That is why we designed three models.

model_individual.title: Individual Ownership
model_individual.closing: This model is for those who want to build a legacy.

model_coproperty.title: Strategic Co-Ownership
model_coproperty.description: Participate alongside other investors in strategically selected assets.
model_coproperty.closing: The balance between premium access and smart structuring.

model_fund.title: Real Estate Fund with Monthly Yield
model_fund.description: This model integrates your investment into a diversified portfolio combining:
model_fund.closing_1: This is not a speculative fund.
model_fund.closing_2: It is a capital architecture backed by real assets.

emotional.title: You don't need millions to invest globally.
emotional.subtitle: You can start from USD 10,000 or structure a complete portfolio.
emotional.closing: The difference isn't how much you have. It's how you structure it.

calculator.title: Simulate your growth
calculator.intro_1: Imagine investing USD 50,000 with a projected 10% annual return.
calculator.field_amount_label: How much do you want to invest?
calculator.field_years_hint: Recommended: 3 to 5 years to maximize results.
calculator.disclaimer: This is a projection based on the average estimated return of selected international markets. It does not constitute a guarantee of return.

institutional.title: We are not traditional intermediaries.
institutional.subtitle: We operate with institutional capital architecture.

closing.line_1: Capital that doesn't move loses power.
